results.title: OP Auto Clicker
results.snippet: OP Auto Clicker is a automation tool that lets you automate mouse clicks. Perfectly compatible with Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10 and 64-bit systems.

results.title: Downloads - OP Auto Clicker
results.snippet: OP Auto Clicker is a automation tool that lets you automate mouse clicks. Perfectly compatible with Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 10 and 64-bit systems.

results.title: How to get started for Windows - OP Auto Clicker
results.snippet: 1. Set the time interval between clicks. 2. Select the mouse button you want to click and the type of click. 3. Set the repeat mode and number of clicks. 4. Select where you want to click. 5. Click the start …

results.title: How to set a shortcut - OP Auto Clicker
results.snippet: 1. Click the Hotkey setting button on the main panel. 2. Click the Start/Stop button on the Hotkey setting panel. 3. Press a key that you want to set as a hotkey, then click the Ok button.

results.title: How to refresh a web page automatically - OP Auto Clicker
